title: Verify Different Entry Points and Widget States Over Time
description: Test that the correct entry point (widget vs. pill) is displayed based on the trial day and that it navigates to the Trial Corner.
preconditions: User has an active trial and is in the experiment cohort.

steps.description: 1. On Day 1 of the trial, load the homepage.
2. Verify the persistent widget is visible and click it.
3. Simulate the passing of time to Day 3 of the trial.

expected_result: On Day 1, the header widget is displayed. On Day 3, the floating pill is displayed instead. Both entry points successfully navigate the user to the Trial Corner upon being clicked.
